degraded.detail: OPENAI_API_KEY absent; external medium+ review ran through the Codex runtime (GPT-5.4) + an internal code-reviewer subagent instead of external_review.py

surface_verification.justification: Pure Python plugin-internal refactor of adopt's shared-module import path (consolidating eight unguarded spec_from_file_location loaders behind one guarded helper). No startable web/API/CLI surface is produced or consumed: adopt scaffolders are library functions exercised by the plugin unit suite (462 tests green), and the monorepo ships no web service (the Command Center WebUI is a separate repo). No backend-affects-frontend edge.

behaviors.behavior: missing shared/ tree raises a named ImportError, not a bare FileNotFoundError
a failing exec_module does not poison the cache (sentinel popped; second call re-raises)
a successful load returns the module and caches it (repeat call is a cache hit, same object)
the module is registered BEFORE exec so a self-referential shared module (@dataclass __module__) can load
all eight rewired scaffolders still resolve their shared symbol on a normal install
